config.screen.title: Village and Pillage Tweaks Config
config.button.label: Input valid item ID
config.description.markerItem: Customizable item ID used to mark beds and workstations
config.description.workstationToggle: Allow marking villager workstation blocks, preventing villagers from accessing them
config.description.bedToggle: Allow marking beds, preventing villagers from accessing them
config.description.sneakToggle: Require sneaking when marking beds and workstations
config.description.trapdoorTweaks: Apply trapdoor pathfinding tweaks for villagers, helping them get unstuck in some scenarios (Experimental, disabled by default)
config.description.raidSpawnRadius: Adjust the circular length in which illagers will spawn in during raids. Vanilla (Default) = 96 Blocks
config.description.namedTraders: Name tagging wandering traders will prevent them from despawning
config.description.namedTraderLlamas: Name tagging trader llamas will prevent them from despawning
